[[File:Ontotheology.svg|thumb|A diagram explaining having mode ontotheology vs being mode theology]]
Ontotheology is a theology which conceives of God as an ultimate being. [[Heidegger]] associates it with nihilism<ref>[[Reacting to the Meaning Crisis]] episode 48 00:08:16</ref>

Some people may conceive of it as in opposition to [[negative theology]], and it may be contrasted likewise with [[process theology]]

== References ==

[[Category:John Vervaeke]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Ontotheology]][[Category:Theology]]
[[sn:Ontotheology]][[sn:Ontotheology]]
[[Category:Pages]]
